Class PartTimeEmployee

java.lang.Object
HumanResources.Employee
HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
All Implemented Interfaces:
DetailsDisplayable
public class PartTimeEmployee extends Employee
Represents a part-time, hourly employee in the HR system.

A part-time employee is paid by the hour and is subject to a maximum number of hours per week. Monthly pay is estimated as hourlyRate * maxHoursPerWeek * 4. Part-time employees also accrue PTO days.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PartTimeEmployee

      public PartTimeEmployee(String employeeID, String name, String department, double hourlyRate, int maxHoursPerWeek, int PTODays)
      Constructs a new PartTimeEmployee with all required employment details.
      Parameters:
      employeeID - the unique identifier for this employee (e.g., "E002")
      name - the full name of the employee
      department - the department to which this employee belongs
      hourlyRate - the pay rate in dollars per hour; should be >= 0
      maxHoursPerWeek - the maximum number of hours this employee may work per week; should be > 0
      PTODays - the number of PTO days accrued; should be >= 0

  • Method Details

    • getHourlyRate

      public double getHourlyRate()
      Returns the employee's hourly pay rate.
      Returns:
      the hourly rate in dollars

    • getMaxHoursPerWeek

      public int getMaxHoursPerWeek()
      Returns the maximum number of hours this employee may work per week.
      Returns:
      the weekly hour cap

    • getPTODays

      public int getPTODays()
      Returns the number of PTO days this employee has accrued.
      Returns:
      the PTO day count

    • setHourlyRate

      public void setHourlyRate(double hourlyRate)
      Updates the employee's hourly pay rate.
      Parameters:
      hourlyRate - the new hourly rate in dollars; should be >= 0

    • setMaxHoursPerWeek

      public void setMaxHoursPerWeek(int maxHoursPerWeek)
      Updates the maximum weekly hours for this employee.
      Parameters:
      maxHoursPerWeek - the new weekly hour cap; should be > 0

    • setPTODays

      public void setPTODays(int PTODays)
      Updates the employee's accrued PTO days.
      Parameters:
      PTODays - the new PTO day count; should be >= 0

    • displayInfo

      public void displayInfo()
      Displays all employee details including hourly rate, max weekly hours, and PTO to standard output.
      Specified by:
      displayInfo in interface DetailsDisplayable
      Specified by:
      displayInfo in class Employee

    • calculatePay

      public double calculatePay()
      Calculates the estimated monthly pay for this employee.

      Computed as hourlyRate * maxHoursPerWeek * 4, assuming four weeks per month at the maximum scheduled hours.

      Specified by:
      calculatePay in class Employee
      Returns:
      the estimated monthly gross pay in dollars

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a concise string representation of this part-time employee.

      Format: [employeeID] name - Part-Time | Dept: department | Est. Monthly Pay: $XX.XX

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a formatted summary string
